notes.note: A natural language name identifying the structure definition. This name should be usable as an identifier for the module by machine processing applications such as code generation.

trans-unit.source: TDDUIBundle
trans-unit.target: TDDUIBundle

notes.note: A short, descriptive, user-friendly title for the structure definition.

trans-unit.source: TDDUI Bundle
trans-unit.target: TDDUI Bundle

notes.note: The name of the organization or individual responsible for the release and ongoing maintenance of the structure definition.

trans-unit.source: ANS
trans-unit.target: ANS

notes.note: The name of an individual to contact.

trans-unit.source: ANS
trans-unit.target: ANS

notes.note: A name for the specification that is being mapped to.

trans-unit.source: HL7 v2 Mapping
trans-unit.target: HL7 v2 Mapping

notes.note: A name for the specification that is being mapped to.

trans-unit.source: RIM Mapping
trans-unit.target: RIM Mapping

notes.note: A name for the specification that is being mapped to.

trans-unit.source: CDA (R2)
trans-unit.target: CDA (R2)

notes.note: A name for the specification that is being mapped to.

trans-unit.source: FiveWs Pattern Mapping
trans-unit.target: FiveWs Pattern Mapping

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Patient conforming to the TDDUIPatient profile, used to convey patients without an INS identity.
trans-unit.target: Patient conforming to the TDDUIPatient profile, used to convey patients without an INS identity.

notes.note: A concise description of what this element means (e.g. for use in autogenerated summaries).

trans-unit.source: Patient conforming to the TDDUIPatientINS profile, used to convey patients identified by an INS identity.
trans-unit.target: Patient conforming to the TDDUIPatientINS profile, used to convey patients identified by an INS identity.
